Class DirectMessageSystemTest

java.lang.Object
application.DirectMessageSystemTest
public class DirectMessageSystemTest extends Object
Test cases for the Direct Message System CRUD operations. Tests core messaging functionality including send, read, update, delete, conversation management, and role-based access controls.

    Closes the database connection after all tests.

    Sets up the database and creates test users with different roles.

    Tests that users are stored alphabetically regardless of send order.

    Tests deleting a message by the sender.
    (package private) void

    Tests retrieving a conversation between two users in chronological order.

    Tests retrieving the conversation list for a user's inbox.

    Tests DirectMessage helper method getOtherUser().

    Tests marking messages in a conversation as read.
    (package private) void

    Tests that only the sender can delete their own message.
    (package private) void

    Tests that only the sender can update their own message.

    Tests user search functionality with role-based filtering.

    Tests successful creation of a direct message between two users.

  • Method Details

    • setupDatabase

      @BeforeAll static void setupDatabase() throws SQLException
      Sets up the database and creates test users with different roles.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • cleanup

      @AfterAll static void cleanup()
      Closes the database connection after all tests.

    • testSendValidDirectMessage

      @Test @DisplayName("Test 1: Send a valid direct message") void testSendValidDirectMessage() throws SQLException
      Tests successful creation of a direct message between two users. Verifies that a positive message ID is returned.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • testAlphabeticalUserOrdering

      @Test @DisplayName("Test 2: Messages stored with alphabetical user ordering") void testAlphabeticalUserOrdering() throws SQLException
      Tests that users are stored alphabetically regardless of send order. Verifies bidirectional conversation storage.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • testGetConversation

      @Test @DisplayName("Test 3: Retrieve conversation between users") void testGetConversation() throws SQLException
      Tests retrieving a conversation between two users in chronological order.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • testGetConversationList

      @Test @DisplayName("Test 4: Get conversation list with summaries") void testGetConversationList() throws SQLException
      Tests retrieving the conversation list for a user's inbox. Verifies summaries include unread counts and last message preview.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • testSearchUsersWithRoleFilter

      @Test @DisplayName("Test 5: Search users with role-based filtering") void testSearchUsersWithRoleFilter() throws SQLException
      Tests user search functionality with role-based filtering.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • testGetTotalUnreadCount

      @Test @DisplayName("Test 6: Get total unread message count") void testGetTotalUnreadCount() throws SQLException
      Tests getting total unread message count for a user.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • testMarkConversationAsRead

      @Test @DisplayName("Test 7: Mark conversation as read") void testMarkConversationAsRead() throws SQLException
      Tests marking messages in a conversation as read.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • testUpdateDirectMessage

      @Test @DisplayName("Test 8: Update message content by sender") void testUpdateDirectMessage() throws SQLException
      Tests updating message content by the sender.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • testNonSenderCannotUpdateMessage

      @Test @DisplayName("Test 9: Non-sender cannot update message") void testNonSenderCannotUpdateMessage() throws SQLException
      Tests that only the sender can update their own message.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • testDeleteDirectMessage

      @Test @DisplayName("Test 10: Delete message by sender") void testDeleteDirectMessage() throws SQLException
      Tests deleting a message by the sender.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • testNonSenderCannotDeleteMessage

      @Test @DisplayName("Test 11: Non-sender cannot delete message") void testNonSenderCannotDeleteMessage() throws SQLException
      Tests that only the sender can delete their own message.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • testGetOtherUserHelper

      @Test @DisplayName("Test 12: DirectMessage getOtherUser helper") void testGetOtherUserHelper() throws SQLException
      Tests DirectMessage helper method getOtherUser().
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • testIsSentByHelper

      @Test @DisplayName("Test 13: DirectMessage isSentBy helper") void testIsSentByHelper() throws SQLException
      Tests DirectMessage helper method isSentBy().
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs
